meaning: adj.[地]薄层的,成薄层的,分层的
examples: As the modern form of dialectics, the structure of systemic dialectics is also straticulate.
Methods Students in middle school were investigated by means of random straticulate cluster sampling.
In this paper, the straticulate dolostone and spatulate dolostone in Lower Ordovician strata of Well Tazhong 1 were studied using petrologic and geochemical methods.
